content.description:
The kernel's main composition module and entry point. Exports the `loadKernel(require, storageBackend)` function which loads all kernel subsystems and returns the `Kernel` class.

## Responsibilities

- **Seed IDs**: Defines well-known GUIDs for foundational items (ATOM, TYPE_DEFINITION, CODE, etc.) and event types
- **Event Bus**: Provides type-hierarchy-aware event dispatch (`api.events.on/off/emit`)
- **Boot Sequence**: Initializes storage, applies styles, sets up error handlers, renders viewport
- **REPL API**: Creates the comprehensive API object available in renderers and the REPL console
- **Item Operations**: Parent-child management, cycle detection, deletion with cleanup
- **Declarative Watches**: Dispatches events to code items that declare `content.watches`
- **Error Capture**: Emits `system:error` events and shows fallback UI when handlers fail

## Key Exports

- `loadKernel(require, storageBackend)` - Async factory returning `Kernel` class

## Dependencies

- [kernel:storage](item://33333333-2222-0000-0000-000000000000)
- [kernel:module-system](item://33333333-4444-0000-0000-000000000000)
- [kernel:rendering](item://33333333-5555-0000-0000-000000000000)
- [kernel:safe-mode](item://33333333-7777-0000-0000-000000000000)
